to progeny will be made. But. it is to observed that these male
planets namely Saturn and Mars cannot beget a child and only if
there are female planets, the question of begetting a child arises.
While predicting about Karma or Profession, it is generally
considered that the planet which is in the lOth house from the
Accendant indicates the Karma or the Profession. For instance
if the Ascendant is Scorpio, Leo is the lOth sign. When the lOth
sign of Leo is occupied by the sun, it is considered that the sun
is the Lord of Karma. But according to causitivity of planets, Sun
is the causitive planet for Soul and not for Karma. Hence the
entire predictions go wrong.
Thus, it can be seen that is becomes extremely wrong to
calculate from the Ascendant.
But, here a question arises, whether there is no need or
necessity to take into account the Ascendant a all? ..
The object of considering the Ascendant is limited to know
